TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Dalia_Grybauskaitńó, title = Dalia_Grybauskaitńó, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dalia_Grybauskaitńó} }

S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Dalia Grybauskaitńó , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lithuania anini i ci Dalia Grybauskaitńó, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …¨~…ģa…ĺia *rjb~b~vao~u~uskait* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺitńßo~u~uania anini i ¶i …¨~…ģa…ĺia *rjb~b~vao~u~uskait*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1956 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad masofoc ci Dalia Grybauskaitńó , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lithuania anini i ci Dalia Grybauskaitńó, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 12 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i …¨~…ģa…ĺia *rjb~b~vao~u~uskait* , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺitńßo~u~uania anini i ¶i …¨~…ģa…ĺia *rjb~b~vao~u~uskait*, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
